run_summary.summary:
Two substantive updates from today's Apr 15 scan:

✍️ **SOJOS contract in motion**: Kenny replied to Ruby this morning — contract looks great, but he asked to waive the 1-week draft clause (Liz is traveling until Sat). Proposed 4/23 as the draft delivery date. Waiting on Ruby to confirm the revised timeline. Updated waiting_on to 'brand'.

✅ **BHG x Walmart contract signed**: Adobe Acrobat Sign sent a completion notice — the Influencer Services License Agreement (Brand Licensing - 88191) is fully executed. Signers: Patrick Cremens (dotdashmdp.com) + Eileen Mchugh (people.inc). Moving to Content — product is already en route.

All other threads (Dreo, Govee, Bringnox, Rust-Oleum, HelloFresh, Ollny, Linkind, Whisker) were already logged in the last run. No new replies from any of those brands yet.

suggestions.message: Kenny's ask to waive the 1-week draft clause + move to 4/23 is reasonable, but if Ruby doesn't confirm by Apr 17 give her a nudge — Liz needs clarity on the timeline before she gets back on Saturday.

Contract is done! Once product arrives and Liz is back from travel (Apr 19+), she's clear to film. If Gretta hasn't given a specific brief or posting window, worth a quick check-in to confirm the outdoor living campaign details.

deals.next_action: Wait for Ruby to confirm revised 4/23 draft timeline
deals.notes: [Apr 15]: Kenny replied to Ruby — contract looks great overall, but requested to waive the 1-week draft clause since glasses just arrived and Liz is traveling until Sat Apr 19. Proposed sending draft by Apr 23 to allow time for revisions and posting by end of month.
deals.activity_note: Apr 15: Kenny replied to Ruby with contract revision request — asked to waive 1-week draft clause, proposed 4/23 deadline. Waiting on Ruby to confirm.

deals.next_action: Film BHG outdoor living content once product arrives (Liz back from travel Apr 19)
deals.notes: [Apr 15]: Adobe Acrobat Sign 'Completed' notification received — Influencer Services License Agreement (Talent) - Brand Licensing - 88191 fully executed by all parties. Signers: Patrick Cremens (dotdashmdp.com) + Eileen Mchugh (people.inc). Contract done, product en route, ready to film.
deals.activity_note: Apr 15: Adobe Sign completion received — BHG contract fully executed. Moved to Content.
